fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this reconciliation choice belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable Excel-address identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The source Excel row number this choice applies to (= BOQ Nodes.source_row_number = the committed grid row_number). Durable identity component.
fields.label: Excel Row

fields.description: The Excel column letter of the AMOUNT cell this choice applies to. PER-CELL identity (this is the difference from BoQ Cell Dismissal, which is per-ROW with no col_letter). Stored VERBATIM. Identity component.
fields.label: Column Letter

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version of the sheet this choice annotates. Annotation is anchored to a committed version; identity component. A re-commit mints a new version, naturally orphaning old choices (no live invalidation code needed).
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: Which value wins for this divergent amount cell: keep_document (the committed/document amount from the tendering workbook) or take_formula (the formula-computed amount). 'Unset' is the ABSENCE of any current record (the default -> document wins, per the locked design D1).
fields.label: Choice

fields.description: A copy of the committed row's description at choose time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD (a future copy-forward slice warns when the committed description changed under a choice). NOT part of the unique key; never branched on.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version) choice version. Incremented on re-choose by the write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the pricing tier).
fields.label: Choice Version

fields.description: Exactly one current choice record per (boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version). The one-current invariant is enforced by the write path (pricing.py save_cell_reconciliation_choice), NOT in this controller (mirrors the pricing-tier convention). A rate save (column-aware, surgical) or a formula save/remove RE-ARMS (freezes -> is_current=0) the affected cells' choices; the read path returns only is_current=1.
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this choice record was written. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Chosen At

fields.description: The user who made this choice. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Chosen By

fields.description: The finalize-pricing lock for this committed version. When set, the choice for this cell is finalized (a later finalize-pricing slice enforces the lock semantics; this slice only declares the marker -- mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing.is_finalized).
fields.label: Is Finalized
